subject: A large rat-like or rodent-like monster crouched in an urban alley, mouth agape with glowing interior
description: A massive, hunched beast fills most of the frame in a dark alley setting. The creature has a broad flat head with a wide-open jaw revealing a bioluminescent or toxic green glow from within its mouth and throat. Its body is covered in rough grey-brown hide with raised spines or quills along the back. Clawed forelimbs dig into the rubble-strewn ground. The background suggests a dark urban canyon — stone walls, dim windows, faint amber light sources. Scattered red debris or fungi dot the ground. The creature's posture is a low, aggressive crouch — territorial and ready to strike.
foreground: massive hunched beast with glowing open maw, claws in rubble
background: dark stone alley walls, dim window light
